issue_body:
**Describe the new feature:** 
When trying out a couple maps which utilise the sliderslide legacy hitsound in standard.
(e.g. [Fort's Ooi](https://osu.ppy.sh/beatmapsets/355573#osu/784791), and a [taikosu! map](https://osu.ppy.sh/beatmapsets/25836#osu/87484). The slider slide aren't utilised in the body of the sliders.

**Proposal designs of the feature:** 
Allowing `soft/normal/drum-sliderslide` from legacy hitsounds into slider bodies. This of course would work the same way as in stable.
pr_body:
- Closes #8790
- [x] Depends on https://github.com/ppy/osu/pull/9645

Please test on https://osu.ppy.sh/beatmapsets/861#osu/5680
